name: codex-claude-loop
description: A Windows-first Codex plugin for Codex-led planning, Claude Code implementation, rework loops, and reusable Claude sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Codex leads planning, review, and acceptance while Claude Code handles implementation through a constrained child-thread loop.
interface.longDescription: Provides a Codex-led implementation-and-rework workflow with a Windows delegate runtime, child-thread enforcement, reusable Claude sessions, parallel pools, audit artifacts, scoped diffs, and bounded review loops.
defaultPrompt: Use codex-claude-loop so Codex plans and reviews while Claude Code handles implementation.
Run the Codex-Claude loop with scoped files and bounded rework.
Review the latest Claude delegate artifacts and decide accept or rework.
